queries.compiledQueryString:
select *
from (select * from pp_inventory.resources_with_signals)
where
  ('${inputs.env_filter.value}'    = 'All' or environment_name = '${inputs.env_filter.value}')
  and ('${inputs.signal_filter.value}' = 'All' or primary_signal  = '${inputs.signal_filter.value}')
order by
  case primary_signal
    when 'orphaned'     then 1
    when 'broken'       then 2
    when 'overshared'   then 3
    when 'premium-risk' then 4
    else 5
  end,
  display_name
queries.inputQueryString:
select *
from ${resources}
where
  ('${inputs.env_filter.value}'    = 'All' or environment_name = '${inputs.env_filter.value}')
  and ('${inputs.signal_filter.value}' = 'All' or primary_signal  = '${inputs.signal_filter.value}')
order by
  case primary_signal
    when 'orphaned'     then 1
    when 'broken'       then 2
    when 'overshared'   then 3
    when 'premium-risk' then 4
    else 5
  end,
  display_name
